english_text: I want to lose five kilograms
I drink a lot of water
I go to the gym three times a week
I track my calories with an app
Chicken breast is good for dieting
I lost three kilos this month
The scale says I gained weight
I eat five small meals a day
I cook at home more often
Diet is eighty percent of weight loss
Health is more important than numbers

romanization: geonganhan sikdaneun saenghwal bangsigieyoA balanced diet is the best diet
